title: First Light and Reionization Epoch Simulations (FLARES) XXII: UV-dust spatial offsets at the Epoch of Reionisation
summary: Recent observations have revealed intriguing offsets between the UV and FIR emission in high redshift galaxies. In this study, we use the First Light And Reionisation Epoch Simulations (\textsc{Flares}) to compute the spatial offset of ultraviolet (UV) and far-infrared (FIR) centres for a statistical sample (6890) of massive (M$_{\star}\, \gtrsim10^{9} \,{\rm M_{\odot}}$) high redshift galaxies ($z \in [5,10]$). The galaxies are post-processed with the \textsc{skirt} radiative transfer code, to obtain the full spectral energy distribution and surface brightness profile. We simulate \textit{James Webb Space Telescope (JWST)} Near Infrared Camera (NIRCam; rest-frame 1500 Å, $ \approx 0.031 ''$ resolution) and ALMA rest-frame 158 \um\ ($\approx$ $0.3''$ angular resolution) observations of the galaxies and then calculate the distance between the UV-FIR centres to analyse which physical processes drive the observed UV - FIR spatial offset. We find that $\sim16.23\%$ of galaxies exhibit spatial offsets of $\geq 2.5$ kpc between their UV and FIR emission peaks. We establish that the spatial offsets do not correlate with stellar mass, UV/FIR luminosity, and size. Offsets also do not correlate with AGN feedback or with large-scale environment or merger history. Galaxies with significant offsets preferentially have bluer UV slopes ($-2.5<β<-1.5$), consistent with recent star formation and dust-attenuated cores displacing the observed UV centroid. They show an accelerated star formation history, forming half their $z=5$ stellar mass $\sim$0.1 Gyr earlier than galaxies without offsets. These galaxies are enriched earlier than galaxies without an offset and show enhanced stellar metallicities, indicating a transition to an outward growth at higher redshifts ($z \geq 6$).

AI.tldr: 利用FLARES模拟和辐射传输后处理，研究了6890个大质量高红移星系（z=5-10）中UV与FIR辐射中心的空间偏移，发现约16%的星系存在≥2.5 kpc的偏移，且偏移与恒星质量、光度、尺度、AGN反馈及环境均无关，主要与更蓝的UV斜率、更早的恒星形成历史和增强的恒星金属丰度相关。
AI.motivation: 高红移星系观测中发现了UV和FIR辐射之间存在空间偏移现象，但对其物理起源和驱动机制尚不清楚。
AI.method: 使用FLARES宇宙学模拟生成6890个星系样本，通过SKIRT辐射传输代码计算完整光谱能量分布和表面亮度分布，模拟JWST NIRCam（~0.031角秒分辨率）和ALMA（~0.3角秒分辨率）观测，测量UV-FIR辐射中心距离并分析相关物理过程。
AI.result: 约16.23%的星系存在≥2.5 kpc的UV-FIR空间偏移；偏移与恒星质量、UV/FIR光度、星系尺度、AGN反馈、大尺度环境及并合历史均无相关性；偏移星系呈现更蓝的UV斜率（-2.5<β<-1.5）、更早的恒星形成历史（形成一半质量早~0.1 Gyr）和更高的恒星金属丰度。
AI.conclusion: UV-FIR偏移主要由星系内部结构驱动——近期恒星形成和尘埃遮蔽核区导致UV质心位移，而非外部因素；偏移星系代表着更高红移（z≥6）时已开始外向增长、演化更早的星系群体。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 最近的观测揭示了高红移星系中紫外（UV）和远红外（FIR）发射之间有趣的空间偏移。在本研究中，我们利用“第一缕光与再电离纪元模拟”（FLARES）来计算一个统计样本（6890个）中大质量（M$_{\star}\, \gtrsim10^{9} \,{\rm M_{\odot}}$）高红移星系（$z \in [5,10]$）的紫外和远红外中心的空间偏移。这些星系经过\textsc{skirt}辐射转移代码的后处理，以获得完整的光谱能量分布和表面亮度轮廓。我们模拟了\textit{詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）}近红外相机（NIRCam；静止框架1500 Å，$ \approx 0.031 ''$分辨率）和ALMA静止框架158 \um\（$\approx$ $0.3''$角分辨率）的观测，然后计算UV-FIR中心之间的距离，以分析哪些物理过程驱动了观测到的UV-FIR空间偏移。我们发现约$\sim16.23\%$的星系在其UV和FIR发射峰值之间表现出$\geq 2.5$ kpc的空间偏移。我们确定空间偏移与恒星质量、UV/FIR光度以及大小无关。偏移也与活动星系核反馈、大尺度环境或并合历史无关。具有显著偏移的星系优先具有更蓝的UV斜率（$-2.5<β<-1.5$），这与最近的恒星形成和尘埃遮蔽的核区导致观测到的UV质心位移相一致。它们表现出加速的恒星形成历史，比没有偏移的星系早约$\sim$0.1 Gyr形成其$z=5$恒星质量的一半。这些星系比没有偏移的星系更早富集，并显示出增强的恒星金属丰度，表明在更高红移（$z \geq 6$）时向外生长的转变。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：UV-FIR偏移主要由星系内部结构驱动——近期恒星形成和尘埃遮蔽核区导致UV质心位移，而非外部因素；偏移星系代表着更高红移（z≥6）时已开始外向增长、演化更早的星系群体。

title: How galaxies acquire their stellar mass at high redshift: High star formation efficiencies and the relative roles of dust and initial mass function
comment: 16 pages, 15 figures, accepted for publication in Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: JWST has measured an unprecedented abundance of galaxies above $z\gtrsim 4-5$, whose formation and evolution are still difficult to reconcile within traditional galaxy evolution models in a $Λ$CDM framework. Here, we present a study on the star formation histories of these high-redshift galaxies between $z\simeq5-12$ via a data-driven semi-empirical model that uses the observed UV LFs as input to retrieve SFRs, naturally bypassing any uncertain modelling of cooling, feedback and/or stochastic processes. Galaxy stellar masses are progressively built in time by integrating their SFRs assigned along their progenitor haloes via the SFR-halo accretion rate relation, derived from abundance matching between the input observed UV LFs with the dark matter halo accretion rate distributions at each redshift. This makes the SFEs a full prediction of the model rather than a tuned input, serving as a natural baseline to test burstiness, dust attenuation, or IMF variations. Our approach naturally reproduces the total stellar mass function, the large-scale clustering, and the star-forming main sequence. We find that massive galaxies grew their stellar mass with a bursty star formation at $z\sim9-10$, broadly in agreement with the star formation histories inferred from spectral energy distribution fitting, with the SFE reaching high peaks of $0.8-0.9$ at $z>9$ and lowering to standard values of $0.2-0.3$ below $z\lesssim9$. We find that the presence of dust could enhance the predicted SFRs at $z\lesssim8$, better reproducing the observed SFRs of massive dusty galaxies, and increase the SFEs to values close to or even above unity at $z \gtrsim 8$. Finally, switching to top-heavy IMFs reduces the SFEs by a factor of $2-3$, highlighting the need for a variable IMF as an inevitable ingredient in the evolution of galaxies at high redshifts to avoid unphysical SFEs, especially in the presence of dust.

AI.tldr: 本文利用半经验模型，基于观测的UV光度函数，通过恒星形成率-暗物质晕吸积率关系，构建了z=5-12高红移星系的恒星形成历史。模型自然地再现了恒星质量函数、大尺度成团性和恒星形成主序，发现大质量星系在z~9-10经历爆发式恒星形成，恒星形成效率在z>9时高达0.8-0.9，尘埃会增强预测的恒星形成率，而顶重初始质量函数则使恒星形成效率降低2-3倍。
AI.motivation: JWST观测到z≳4-5以上超乎预期的丰富星系，传统ΛCDM星系演化模型难以解释其形成和演化，因此需要新的方法来理解这些高红移星系的恒星形成历史。
AI.method: 采用数据驱动的半经验模型，以观测的UV光度函数为输入，通过恒星形成率-暗物质晕吸积率关系（来自丰度匹配）分配恒星形成率，积分得到恒星质量。恒星形成效率是模型的预测而非调谐输入。
AI.result: 模型自然再现了恒星质量函数、大尺度成团性和恒星形成主序。大质量星系在z~9-10爆发式增长，恒星形成效率在z>9时高达0.8-0.9，在z≲9时降至0.2-0.3。尘埃增强z≲8的恒星形成率，顶重初始质量函数使恒星形成效率降低2-3倍。
AI.conclusion: 该半经验模型有效解释了JWST观测的高红移星系，尘埃和可变初始质量函数是高红移星系演化中不可忽视的因素，尤其是可变初始质量函数对避免非物理的恒星形成效率至关重要。

artifacts.abstract_zh: JWST在红移$z\gtrsim 4-5$以上测量到了前所未有的丰富星系，其形成和演化在$Λ$CDM框架内仍难以用传统星系演化模型解释。本文通过一个数据驱动的半经验模型，利用观测到的紫外光度函数作为输入来反演恒星形成率，自然绕过了对冷却、反馈和/或随机过程的不确定建模，研究了这些红移$z\simeq5-12$之间高红移星系的恒星形成历史。星系恒星质量通过沿其祖先暗晕的恒星形成率-暗晕吸积率关系（该关系通过在每个红移处将输入的观测紫外光度函数与暗晕吸积率分布进行丰度匹配导出）积分其恒星形成率而随时间逐步累积。这使得恒星形成效率成为模型的完全预测而非调谐输入，为检验爆发性、尘埃消光或初始质量函数变化提供了自然基线。我们的方法自然地再现了总恒星质量函数、大尺度成团性和恒星形成主序。我们发现，大质量星系在$z\sim9-10$时通过爆发性恒星形成增长其恒星质量，这与从光谱能量分布拟合推断的恒星形成历史大致一致，恒星形成效率在$z>9$时达到$0.8-0.9$的高峰，并在$z\lesssim9$以下降至$0.2-0.3$的标准值。我们发现，尘埃的存在可能增强$z\lesssim8$处的预测恒星形成率，更好地再现观测到的大质量尘埃星系的恒星形成率，并在$z \gtrsim 8$时将恒星形成效率提高到接近甚至超过1的值。最后，切换到顶部重的初始质量函数会使恒星形成效率降低$2-3$倍，这凸显了可变初始质量函数作为高红移星系演化中不可避免的成分的必要性，以避免非物理的恒星形成效率，尤其是在存在尘埃的情况下。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该半经验模型有效解释了JWST观测的高红移星系，尘埃和可变初始质量函数是高红移星系演化中不可忽视的因素，尤其是可变初始质量函数对避免非物理的恒星形成效率至关重要。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Distribution of the TNG subhaloes on the star formation rate-halo accretion rate plane (blue dots), and median star formation rate-halo accretion rate relations from the TNG (blue lines) and computed using the TNG’s inputs via the abundance matching described in Section 2.2 (orange dashed lines) at redshifts \(z=6-11\) . The subplots in each panel show the distribution normalised to unity of the star formation rate in a halo accretion rate bin of \(0.2\) dex width centred at \(\dot{M}_{h}\sim 10\,M_{\odot}\,{yr}^{-1}\) , and the distributions in other bins follow a similar behaviour.

The cyan coloured area shows the redshift evolution region of the relation from \(z=0\) to \(6\) , as presented in Fu et al. ( 2025a ) and Fu et al. ( 2025b ) . figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Evolution of the cosmic stellar mass density. title: Survival of very small carbonaceous dust grains in the inner-CGM of NGC 891 from JWST/MIRI MRS
summary: We present new spectroscopic observations of the inner circumgalactic medium (CGM) of NGC 891 taken with the Mid-Infrared Imager/Medium Resolution Spectroscopy instrument onboard JWST, in four positions: two near the bulge and two at galactocentric radii (r) of ~ 1.5, 4.7 kpc. Each pair of pointings has one position along the minor axis (h) at ~ 0.5 kpc and one at ~ 1 kpc away from the mid-plane. We analyse both 1D spectra and 3D cubes using the dust emission model PAHFIT to extract properties of typical mid-IR features. These spectra reveal that the earlier reported mid-IR emission out to 4 kpc is dominated by the emission of polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons (PAHs), and not hot dust continuum, providing direct evidence of the survival of PAHs in the inner CGM of NGC 891. Comparing PAH band ratios with other environments (Orion, M51), it is obvious that the 11.2 $μ$m PAH feature -- and not the usual 7.7 $μ$m -- dominates in NGC 891, which seems to imply the presence of more neutral, large PAHs in the CGM. Overall, PAH-to-continuum ratios show little variations with scale-height and radius in NGC 891, which suggests little PAH processing. However, we do see a decrease in the PAH feature strengths with the [Ne III]/[Ne II] ratio, pointing at elevated dust processing with increased radiation field hardness. We also confirm a tight correlation between H2 and PAH features, suggesting that both tracers must be co-spatial and, hence, implying that PAH emission predominantly arises from cool dense parts of cloudlets entrained in galactic outflows. Finally, we report the clear detection of a previously unidentified PAH feature at 16.72 $μ$m.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST中红外光谱观测NGC 891星系内周介质，发现多环芳烃（PAHs）在其中存活并主导中红外发射，且以中性大PAH为主，PAH与H2共空间分布，表明其来自外流中的冷密云团。
AI.motivation: 探究星系内周介质（CGM）中多环芳烃（PAHs）的存在状态、存活能力及物理化学演化，以理解星系物质循环和反馈过程。
AI.method: 使用JWST中红外成像/中等分辨率光谱仪获取NGC 891内CGM四个位置的1D光谱和3D数据立方体，利用尘埃辐射模型PAHFIT提取中红外特征，分析PAH波段比值、PAH与连续谱比值、[Ne III]/[Ne II]比值及H2关联。
AI.result: 确认先前报告的中红外发射由PAH主导而非热尘埃连续谱；11.2 μm PAH特征占主导而非常见的7.7 μm，表明存在更多中性大PAH；PAH与连续谱比值随尺度高度和半径变化很小；PAH特征强度随[Ne III]/[Ne II]比值增加而降低；PAH与H2发射紧密相关；新发现16.72 μm PAH特征。
AI.conclusion: PAHs能在星系内周介质中存活，主要以中性大分子形式存在，且PAH与H2共空间分布，表明其来源于星系外流中的冷密云团；辐射场硬度增加会加速PAH处理过程。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了利用JWST上的中红外成像仪/中分辨率光谱仪对NGC 891内周介质（CGM）进行的新光谱观测，观测位置共四个：两个靠近核球，两个位于银心距（r）约1.5和4.7 kpc处。每对指向中，一个位于银道面垂直方向（h）约0.5 kpc处，另一个位于约1 kpc处。我们使用尘埃辐射模型PAHFIT分析了一维光谱和三维数据立方体，以提取典型中红外特征的性质。这些光谱揭示，先前报道的延伸至4 kpc的中红外辐射主要由多环芳烃（PAHs）的辐射主导，而非热尘埃连续谱，这直接证明了PAHs在NGC 891内CGM中的存活。将PAH谱带比率与其他环境（猎户座、M51）进行比较，明显可见NGC 891中占主导的是11.2 μm PAH特征——而非通常的7.7 μm——这似乎表明CGM中存在更多中性、大尺寸的PAHs。总体而言，NGC 891中PAH与连续谱的比率随标高和半径变化很小，表明PAH处理过程很少。然而，我们确实观察到PAH特征强度随[Ne III]/[Ne II]比率下降，表明辐射场硬度增加时尘埃处理加剧。我们还确认了H2与PAH特征之间存在紧密相关性，表明这两种示踪物必定共空间分布，因此意味着PAH辐射主要来源于星系外流中夹带的冷密云团。最后，我们报告了在16.72 μm处清晰探测到一个先前未识别的PAH特征。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，PAHs能在星系内周介质中存活，主要以中性大分子形式存在，且PAH与H2共空间分布，表明其来源于星系外流中的冷密云团；辐射场硬度增加会加速PAH处理过程。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: 2MASS J-band image of NGC 891 with the four MIRI/MRS positions presented in this paper: Obs r1.5,h0.5 and Obs r1.5,h1.0 lie near the bulge, and Obs r4.7,h0.5 and Obs r4.7,h1.0 at \(r\sim 4.7\penalty 10000\ \) kpc, where each pair has pointings at \(h\sim 0.5\penalty 10000\ \) kpc and \(h\sim 1.0\penalty 10000\ \) kpc. Additional footprints of available JWST data are shown: MIRI imaging is shown in dark red/brown, with the strip available in F770W (see Chastenet et al. , 2024 ) . The dark blue footprint shows the NIRCam coverage for F150W/F277W (Chastenet et al. , 2024 ) . The dashed line shows the footprint of GO 2433 (PI: Howk) data available in MIRI F560W/F770W. The cross marks the centre of the galaxy.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：NGC 891的2MASS J波段图像，显示了本文中四个MIRI/MRS位置：Obs r1.5,h0.5和Obs r1.5,h1.0位于核球附近，Obs r4.7,h0.5和Obs r4.7,h1.0位于\(r\sim 4.7\penalty 10000\ \) kpc处，每对指向的\(h\sim 0.5\penalty 10000\ \) kpc和\(h\sim 1.0\penalty 10000\ \) kpc。还显示了可用JWST数据的额外覆盖区：MIRI成像以深红/棕色显示，F770W波段条带可见（参见Chastenet等人，2024）。深蓝色覆盖区显示了F150W/F277W的NIRCam覆盖范围（Chastenet等人，2024）。虚线显示了GO 2433（PI: Howk）在MIRI F560W/F770W波段数据的覆盖区。十字标记了星系中心。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Key information for the four main observations and background pointing. 4 4 4 We list observations 5 through 8 and refer to their \((r,\penalty 10000\ h)\) in the text. The \(\sim\) symbol indicates a tentative detection.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：四个主要观测和背景指向的关键信息。4 4 4 我们列出了观测5至8，并在文中用\((r,\penalty 10000\ h)\)表示。\(\sim\)符号表示暂定探测。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Average spectra for the four observations, with 50 MJy/sr offsets for (the bottom of the shaded area shows the 0-point in each case). We label mid-IR features and emission lines of interest. Obs r1.5,h0.5 and Obs r4.7,h0.5 show the cleanest features and highest intensities for the identified lines. While showing a lower S/N, Obs r1.5,h1.0 and Obs r4.7,h1.0 still exhibit some features and the brightest emission lines. The wavelength range \(\uplambda\geq 23\penalty 10000\ \upmu\) m is not shown as it is not used at this stage.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：四个观测的平均光谱，偏移量为50 MJy/sr（阴影区域底部显示每种情况下的零点）。我们标记了感兴趣的中红外特征和发射线。Obs r1.5,h0.5和Obs r4.7,h0.5显示出最清晰的特征和最高的识别线强度。虽然信噪比较低，但Obs r1.5,h1.0和Obs r4.7,h1.0仍显示出一些特征和最亮的发射线。波长范围\(\uplambda\geq 23\penalty 10000\ \upmu\) m未显示，因为在此阶段未使用。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: All spectra, continuum-subtracted using the best-fit stellar and hot dust components from 1D PAHFIT results. While Obs r4.7,h0.5 (green) shows notably higher flux densities, the shapes of the mid-IR features are in good agreement with Obs r1.5,h0.5 (brown). Obs r1.5,h1.0 (orange) and Obs r4.7,h1.0 (blue) show a clear decrease in mid-IR emission, but the brightest features persist (e.g. 7.7, 11.2, 17 \(\upmu\) m). The shaded grey regions mark the stitching wavelengths between channels. Some of the sub-features, at 6.19, 6.23, 6.45, 6.50, 7.40, 7.60, 7.80, 11.15, 13.30, 13.60, 14.20, 16.45, 16.72, and 17.8 \(\upmu\) m, discussed in Section 3.1 are marked by black vertical lines.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：所有光谱，使用一维PAHFIT结果中的最佳拟合恒星和热尘埃成分减去连续谱。虽然Obs r4.7,h0.5（绿色）显示出明显更高的通量密度，但中红外特征的形状与Obs r1.5,h0.5（棕色）吻合良好。Obs r1.5,h1.0（橙色）和Obs r4.7,h1.0（蓝色）显示中红外发射明显减弱，但最亮的特征仍然存在（例如7.7、11.2、17 \(\upmu\) m）。灰色阴影区域标记了通道之间的拼接波长。一些子特征，如6.19、6.23、6.45、6.50、7.40、7.60、7.80、11.15、13.30、13.60、14.20、16.45、16.72和17.8 \(\upmu\) m，在第3.1节中讨论，用黑色竖线标记。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Portions of mid-IR spectra focused on a few typical PAH features. We show an average of the observations Obs r1.5,h0.5 and Obs r4.7,h0.5 spectra for NGC 891 in olive-green colour, the ‘atomic’ and ‘DF3’ templates from the PDRs4All program in solid and dash-dot blue lines, and an average of the three pointings in M51 in dash black. We add the average spectrum of the east pointing from Rand et al. ( 2008 ) in the 11.2 \(\upmu\) m panel (it is too noisy in other panels). The shaded grey regions mark the stitching wavelengths between channels. The dark green lines mark the normalising wavelengths.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：聚焦于几个典型PAH特征的中红外光谱部分。我们以橄榄绿色显示NGC 891的Obs r1.5,h0.5和Obs r4.7,h0.5光谱的平均值，以蓝色实线和点划线显示PDRs4All计划的“原子”和“DF3”模板，以黑色虚线显示M51中三个指向的平均值。我们在11.2 \(\upmu\) m面板中添加了Rand等人（2008）东向指向的平均光谱（在其他面板中噪声太大）。灰色阴影区域标记了通道之间的拼接波长。深绿色线标记了归一化波长。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Best fits for each 1D spectrum with our spectral model described in Section 3.3 using PAHFIT (with emission lines removed for better comparison of dust features). Overall, the model based on an average of Obs r1.5,h0.5 and Obs r4.7,h0.5 fits well all observations, and adjusts to the low-emission spectra Obs r1.5,h1.0 and Obs r4.7,h1.0 . Note the difference in continuum between Obs r1.5,h0.5 and Obs r4.7,h0.5 , near the disk, Obs r1.5,h1.0 and Obs r4.7,h1.0 away from the disk. Although Obs r4.7,h0.5 is at higher galactocentric radius, it shows more pronounced PAH features than Obs r1.5,h0.5 , closer to the bulge. We also show the wavelength-dependent residuals corresponding to each fit, and their histogram. As expected, the fit appears better for the high-S/N spectra of Obs r1.5,h0.5 and Obs r4.7,h0.5 .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：使用第3.3节描述的PAHFIT光谱模型对每个一维光谱的最佳拟合（为更好比较尘埃特征，已移除发射线）。总体而言，基于Obs r1.5,h0.5和Obs r4.7,h0.5平均值的模型很好地拟合了所有观测，并适应了低发射光谱Obs r1.5,h1.0和Obs r4.7,h1.0。注意盘面附近Obs r1.5,h0.5和Obs r4.7,h0.5之间连续谱的差异，以及远离盘面的Obs r1.5,h1.0和Obs r4.7,h1.0之间的差异。尽管Obs r4.7,h0.5位于更大的银心距，但它显示出比靠近核球的Obs r1.5,h0.5更明显的PAH特征。我们还显示了每个拟合对应的波长相关残差及其直方图。正如预期，拟合对于高信噪比光谱Obs r1.5,h0.5和Obs r4.7,h0.5效果更好。

title: NISER-IUCAA New Simulations of JWST GAlaxies and Quasars(NINJA): Properties of galaxies at $5 \leq z \leq 10$
summary: We present the NINJA suite of cosmological hydrodynamical simulations developed to investigate galaxy formation and evolution at $z \gtrsim 5$ in the era of JWST. Using our fiducial simulation, we explore a range of spectral synthesis prescriptions and dust attenuation models, demonstrating that suitably chosen parameters can reproduce the observed UV luminosity functions (UVLFs) over $5 \leq z \leq 10$. In all cases, the inferred dust-to-metal ratio evolves with redshift, although its normalization at fixed redshift varies by a factor of $\sim 7$, depending on the adopted dust--metallicity scaling and attenuation curve. These model variations introduce substantial scatter in predictions for the $B$-band luminosity function, the H$α$ luminosity function, the UV slope--UV magnitude relation, the stellar mass--Balmer ratio relation, and the relation between stellar and nebular colour excesses. Simultaneously reproducing these observables across multiple redshifts will therefore be essential for constraining dust models at high redshift with forthcoming observations. Observations of galaxies spanning a broad range of stellar masses with the Atacama Large Millimeter/submillimeter Array (ALMA) will provide particularly strong and independent constraints on dust properties. Our fiducial models underpredict the UV luminosity function at $z \geq 10$ relative to current observations, even when adopting a top-heavy IMF and neglecting dust attenuation. We find that galaxy properties are not fully converged at these redshifts in our simulation, indicating that higher-resolution simulations are required to robustly model galaxies at $z > 10$. We further emphasize that degeneracies between feedback prescriptions used in our simulation and dust properties must be carefully addressed when interpreting high-redshift observations and calibrating galaxy formation models.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了NINJA宇宙学流体动力学模拟套件，研究了JWST时代z≥5的星系形成与演化。通过调整光谱合成模型和尘埃衰减参数，可重现5≤z≤10的观测UV光度函数，但模型之间存在显著差异，需要多观测约束来限制高红移尘埃模型。在z≥10时，模型低估了UVLF，表明需要更高分辨率的模拟。
AI.motivation: 为了在JWST时代研究高红移（z≥5）星系的形成与演化，需要能够重现观测结果的宇宙学模拟工具，同时探究尘埃模型、反馈机制等关键物理过程对模拟结果的影响。
AI.method: 使用NINJA宇宙学流体动力学模拟套件，结合不同的光谱合成模型和尘埃衰减模型，调整参数以匹配5≤z≤10的观测UVLF，并比较多种观测量的预测结果。
AI.result: 适当参数可以重现5≤z≤10的UVLF；尘埃-金属比随红移演化，但归一化因子在不同模型间变化约7倍；不同模型在B波段LF、Hα LF、UV斜率-星等相关关系等预测上存在显著散射；在z≥10时模型低估了UVLF，星系性质未完全收敛。
AI.conclusion: 同时再现多个红移下的多种观测对约束高红移尘埃模型至关重要；ALMA观测可提供独立约束；z>10需要更高分辨率模拟；需谨慎处理反馈方案与尘埃属性之间的简并问题。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们介绍了NINJA宇宙学流体动力学模拟套件，旨在JWST时代研究红移$z \gtrsim 5$处的星系形成与演化。利用我们的基准模拟，我们探索了一系列光谱合成方案和尘埃消光模型，证明适当选择的参数可以重现$5 \leq z \leq 10$范围内观测到的紫外光度函数（UVLFs）。在所有情况下，推断的尘埃-金属比随红移演化，尽管其在固定红移处的归一化因子因所采用的尘埃-金属丰度标定和消光曲线不同而变化约$\sim 7$倍。这些模型变化给$B$波段光度函数、H$α$光度函数、紫外斜率-紫外星等相关关系、恒星质量-巴尔默比关系以及恒星与星云色余之间的关系带来了显著弥散。因此，同时重现这些跨多个红移的可观测量对于利用即将到来的观测约束高红移尘埃模型至关重要。利用阿塔卡马大型毫米/亚毫米阵列（ALMA）对覆盖广泛恒星质量范围的星系进行观测，将为尘埃性质提供特别强且独立的约束。我们的基准模型在$z \geq 10$处相对于当前观测低估了紫外光度函数，即使采用上重初始质量函数并忽略尘埃消光也是如此。我们发现，在我们的模拟中，这些红移处的星系性质并未完全收敛，这表明需要更高分辨率的模拟来稳健地建模$z > 10$的星系。我们进一步强调，在解释高红移观测和校准星系形成模型时，必须谨慎处理模拟中使用的反馈方案与尘埃性质之间的简并问题。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：同时再现多个红移下的多种观测对约束高红移尘埃模型至关重要；ALMA观测可提供独立约束；z>10需要更高分辨率模拟；需谨慎处理反馈方案与尘埃属性之间的简并问题。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : A sample rest frame spectra of a \(z\sim 7\) halo generated by our spectral systhesis code. The gray shaded regions indicate different spectral ranges used to calculated fluxes that are compared with observational measurements. The UV-band (1500 \(\pm\) 50Å) is used for UV magnitude, B-band (4300Å) with Johnson filter (shown as shaded transmission curve) is used for B-band magnitude. Both the magnitudes are used to obtain luminosity functions to compare with observations. The \(\text{H}_{\alpha}\) and \(\text{H}_{\beta}\) line flux is calculated at emission line wavelength 6562.8Å and 4861.32Å respectively to obtain Balmer ratio \(\text{H}_{\alpha}/\text{H}_{\beta}\) and \(\text{H}_{\alpha}\) luminosity function. Photometry points at 1500Å and 2600Å with band width 100Å is used to get UV slope \(\beta_{\text{UV}}\) assuming power law \(f_{\lambda}=\lambda^{\beta_{\text{UV}}}\) . The Balmer ratio is used to get nebular color excess \(E(B-V)_{\text{nebular}}\) . For stellar color excess \(E(B-V)_{\text{stellar}}\) photometry points at B-band (4300Å) and V-band (5500Å) is used with band width 20Å and 100Å respectively. A smaller band width is used in B-band to avoid line contamination from \(\text{H}_{\gamma}\) .

title: The first near-infrared high-resolution échelle spectroscopy of the outflow in NGC 4151. A study of the clouds covering the Eye of Sauron
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures, 3 tables, accepted for publication on Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: We present the first high-resolution near-infrared spectroscopy of the nucleus of the nearby, well-known Seyfert galaxy NGC 4151 (the "Eye of Sauron"). Past studies of this source have revealed that it exhibits a variable absorption feature associated with the He I $λ$10,830 AA emission line, potentially indicative of obscuration events affecting the central engine. Here, we take advantage of the IRTF/iSHELL and TNG/GIANO-B spectrographs to observe this feature with unprecedented spectral resolution ($λ/Δλ> 50,000$), being able to study in detail the structure of the absorption trough and its variations over a time span of $\sim$700 days. In order to infer a connection between the He I absorption variability and that of the X-ray ionising continuum, we also analyse the publicly available data collected by the Swift-XRT instrument over the same period of time, unveiling a potential driving mechanism in the changes of the outflow ionisation state due to the X-ray flux variations. We also derive outflow physical parameters - $\dot{M}_{\rm out} \lesssim 10^{-2}$ M$_\odot$ yr$^{-1}$, $r_{\rm out} \sim 3$ pc, $v_{\rm max} \sim 1000$ km s$^{-1}$ - that are in line with those of comparable ionised winds found in similar targets, where the outflow is not powerful enough to trigger a significant AGN feedback ($\dot{E}_{\rm kin}/L_{\rm bol} \sim 0.001$%). Such findings point at a scenario in which a dusty and clumpy outflow that obscures NGC 4151 up to galactic scales responds to changes in the ionising X-ray flux, similarly to what happens in quasars with broad absorption lines and Seyferts with multiphase outflows such as NGC 5548.

AI.tldr: 本文利用IRTF/iSHELL和TNG/GIANO-B高分辨率光谱仪，对赛弗特星系NGC 4151（"索伦之眼"）的He I λ10830Å吸收特征进行了前所未有的高分辨率观测（λ/Δλ>50,000），结合Swift-XRT X射线数据，发现该吸收特征的变化与X射线电离连续谱变化相关，表明尘埃团块状外流响应X射线通量变化，但外流动能不足以触发显著的AGN反馈（动能率/辐射光度~0.001%）。
AI.motivation: 过去研究发现NGC 4151存在可变的He I吸收特征，可能指示中央引擎的遮蔽事件，但缺乏高分辨率光谱来解析吸收槽的精细结构及其与X射线电离连续谱变化的联系。
AI.method: 利用IRTF/iSHELL和TNG/GIANO-B光谱仪获取超高分辨率（λ/Δλ>50,000）近红外光谱，结合Swift-XRT X射线数据，在~700天时间跨度内分析He I吸收特征的结构变化与X射线通量变化的相关性。
AI.result: 发现He I吸收特征变化与X射线电离连续谱变化存在潜在驱动关系；推导出外流物理参数：质量损失率≲10⁻² M☉/yr，外流半径~3 pc，最大速度~1000 km/s；外流动能率仅占辐射光度的~0.001%，不足以触发显著AGN反馈。
AI.conclusion: NGC 4151中尘埃团块状外流响应电离X射线通量变化，导致遮蔽现象，这种机制与类星体中的宽吸收线和NGC 5548等多相外流赛弗特星系类似，但该外流能量不足以产生显著反馈效应。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们首次展示了邻近著名赛弗特星系NGC 4151（“索伦之眼”）核心的高分辨率近红外光谱。过去对该源的研究揭示，其与He I λ10,830 Å发射线相关的吸收特征存在变化，可能表明中央引擎的遮蔽事件。本文利用IRTF/iSHELL和TNG/GIANO-B光谱仪，以前所未有的光谱分辨率（λ/Δλ > 50,000）观测该特征，得以详细研究吸收槽的结构及其在约700天时间跨度内的变化。为推断He I吸收变化与X射线电离连续谱变化之间的联系，我们还分析了同一时期Swift-XRT仪器公开收集的数据，揭示了X射线通量变化导致外流电离状态变化的潜在驱动机制。我们还推导了外流物理参数——Ṁ_out ≲ 10^{-2} M_⊙ yr^{-1}、r_out ∼ 3 pc、v_max ∼ 1000 km s^{-1}——这些参数与类似目标中可比的电离风一致，其中外流不足以触发显著的AGN反馈（Ė_kin/L_bol ∼ 0.001%）。这些发现指向一个情景：遮蔽NGC 4151直至星系尺度的尘埃团块状外流响应电离X射线通量变化，类似于具有宽吸收线的类星体和具有多相外流的赛弗特星系（如NGC 5548）中发生的情况。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：NGC 4151中尘埃团块状外流响应电离X射线通量变化，导致遮蔽现象，这种机制与类星体中的宽吸收线和NGC 5548等多相外流赛弗特星系类似，但该外流能量不足以产生显著反馈效应。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Journal of observations. The signal-to-noise ratios \(S/N\) of each resulting spectrum are computed according to the prescriptions listed in Rosales-Ortega et al. ( 2012 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：观测日志。每个所得光谱的信噪比\(S/N\)根据Rosales-Ortega等人（2012）列出的规定计算。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: NGC 4151 high-resolution spectra around the He I \(\lambda\) 10,830 Å emission feature in the observer frame. In each panel, the instrument and epoch of acquisition is indicated ( see legends ), along with both the zero-flux level ( dotted lines ) and the position of the He I transition in the observer frame ( dashed line ). The different flux levels are due to the lack of an inter-calibration among the spectra.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：NGC 4151在观测者参考系中He I \(\lambda\) 10,830 Å发射特征周围的高分辨率光谱。在每个面板中，标明了仪器和获取历元（见图例），以及零流量水平（虚线）和观测者参考系中He I跃迁的位置（虚线）。不同的流量水平是由于光谱之间缺乏相互校准。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Top panel: rest frame NGC 4151 low-resolution spectrum taken with IRTF /SpeX on 2020 May 19th. Middle panel: spectrum taken with IRTF /SpeX on 2021 February 1st. Bottom panel: spectrum taken with TNG /NICS on 2022 June 15th. In all panels, the best fit to the continuum emission ( red solid line ) is shown superimposed to the data ( black solid line ) along with the host-galaxy template spectrum ( blue dotted line ), the AGN power law ( green short-dashed line ) and the two BB components ( magenta long-short-dashed line and yellow dot-dashed line ). The major IR emission lines (Landt et al. , 2008 ) are labelled. As per the high-resolution spectra, the different flux levels are due to the lack of an inter-calibration procedure.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：上面板：2020年5月19日使用IRTF/SpeX拍摄的NGC 4151静止参考系低分辨率光谱。中间面板：2021年2月1日使用IRTF/SpeX拍摄的光谱。下面板：2022年6月15日使用TNG/NICS拍摄的光谱。在所有面板中，连续发射的最佳拟合（红色实线）叠加在数据（黑色实线）上，同时显示了宿主星系模板光谱（蓝色点线）、AGN幂律（绿色短虚线）和两个BB分量（品红色长-短虚线和黄色点划线）。主要红外发射线（Landt等人，2008）已标注。与高分辨率光谱一样，不同的流量水平是由于缺乏相互校准程序。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Rest-frame best-fit profiles of the He I \(+\) Pa \(\gamma\) blended emission around 1.08 \(\mu\) m. Top panel: 2020 May 18th epoch. Middle panel: 2021 January 31st epoch. Bottom panel: 2022 May 20th epoch. In all panels, the total unabsorbed emission profile ( red solid line is shown superimposed to the data ( black solid line ), along with the continuum flux level ( purple dot-dashed line ) and the emission components adopted for the line decomposition ( dashed lines ). In addition, both the zero-level flux ( black dotted line ) and the masked region ( grey band ) are indicated.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：静止参考系中He I \(+\) Pa \(\gamma\) 混合发射在1.08 \(\mu\) m附近的最佳拟合轮廓。上面板：2020年5月18日历元。中间面板：2021年1月31日历元。下面板：2022年5月20日历元。在所有面板中，总未吸收发射轮廓（红色实线）叠加在数据（黑色实线）上，同时显示了连续流量水平（紫色点划线）和用于线分解的发射分量（虚线）。此外，还标出了零流量水平（黑色点线）和掩蔽区域（灰色带）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Top panel: spectral decomposition of the He I absorption at high resolution in the 2020 epoch. Middle panel: the same for the 2021 epoch. Bottom panel: the same for the 2022 epoch. In the bottom panel, the masks applied to the narrow absorption features mounted on top of the broad He I trough ( grey bands ) are shown. In all panels, both the emission level normalised to the pseudo-continuum model and the zero-velocity position ( black dashed lines ) are indicated, and the total absorption model ( red dashed line ) is plotted along with the single absorption components ( dot-dashed lines ).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：上面板：2020历元高分辨率下He I吸收的光谱分解。中间面板：2021历元的相同情况。下面板：2022历元的相同情况。在下面板中，显示了应用于宽He I吸收槽顶部窄吸收特征（灰色带）的掩模。在所有面板中，标出了归一化到伪连续谱模型的发射水平和零速度位置（黑色虚线），并绘制了总吸收模型（红色虚线）以及单个吸收分量（点划线）。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Best-fit parameters of the NGC 4151 NIR spectral features. 3 3 3 The top section reports the best-fit parameters of the NGC 4151 continuum emission components for the analysed epochs of observation, along with the values of the corresponding goodness-of-fit statistical analysis. The central section reports the best-fit velocity parameters of the He I \(\lambda\) 10,380 emission features. The bottom section reports the best-fit velocity parameters of the He I \(\lambda\) 10,380 absorption features.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：NGC 4151近红外光谱特征的最佳拟合参数。3 3 3 顶部部分报告了所分析观测历元NGC 4151连续发射分量的最佳拟合参数，以及相应的拟合优度统计分析值。中间部分报告了He I \(\lambda\) 10,380发射特征的最佳拟合速度参数。底部部分报告了He I \(\lambda\) 10,380吸收特征的最佳拟合速度参数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Time variability of the NGC 4151 He I \(\lambda\) 10,830 absorption parameters. Left panel: column density of neutral helium atoms in the \(2^{3}\) S state. Middle panel: velocity blueshifts. Right panel: FWHMs of each absorption component. In all panels, the three components of the He I absorption system are identified by the same colors and symbols ( see legend ).
figures.caption_zh: 图5：NGC 4151 He I \(\lambda\) 10,830吸收参数的时间变化。左面板：\(2^{3}\) S态中性氦原子的柱密度。中间面板：速度蓝移。右面板：每个吸收分量的半高全宽。在所有面板中，He I吸收系统的三个分量由相同的颜色和符号标识（见图例）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Multi-epoch evolution of the NGC 4151 X-ray parameters compared to the He I column density, along with the corresponding 1 \(\sigma\) uncertainties. Top panel: soft X-ray flux \(F_{X}^{(s)}\) (0.5–2 keV, red points ). Upper mid panel: column density \(N_{H}^{(X)}\) of the X-ray neutral absorber ( green crosses ). Lower mid panel: hardness ratio of the X-ray spectrum ( blue squares . Bottom panel: column density \(N_{HeI}^{(tot)}(2^{3}{S})\) of the He I absorber ( black stars ). In the column density panels, the zero level dotted line is indicated.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：NGC 4151 X射线参数的多历元演化与He I柱密度比较，以及相应的1 \(\sigma\) 不确定性。上面板：软X射线通量\(F_{X}^{(s)}\)（0.5–2 keV，红点）。上中面板：X射线中性吸收体的柱密度\(N_{H}^{(X)}\)（绿色十字）。下中面板：X射线光谱的硬度比（蓝色方块）。下面板：He I吸收体的柱密度\(N_{HeI}^{(tot)}(2^{3}{S})\)（黑色星形）。在柱密度面板中，标出了零水平虚线。
